critic_findings.message:
AC4 not covered: no test passes the alias 'htmlContent="

"' to HtmlEmbedConfig and asserts html_content == "

". Only the default case (empty string) is tested. The populate_by_name alias round-trip is never exercised.

AC3 partially uncovered: the acceptance criterion requires ImageConfig to reject extra keys. No pytest.raises(ValidationError) test exists for ImageConfig with an extra field — only RichTextConfig (line 22) has a strict/extra-key rejection test.

AC6 not covered: no test asserts that every model's JSON schema has additionalProperties == False. extra='forbid' enforces this at runtime but the acceptance criterion requires a real schema assertion, e.g. assert Model.model_json_schema().get('additionalProperties') is False for all 5 models.
